---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea, improvement, or new project for Vajratrix Group
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Describe the Solution You'd Like
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Would you be willing to help build this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this myself
- [ ] I can help but would need guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting the idea
